sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ عِيدُ الفِطْرِ بَهْجَةً لَا تُوصَفُ فِي العَالَمِ العَرَبِيِّ، حَيْثُ يَجْتَمِعُ الأَهْلُ وَالأَصْدِقَاءُ بَعْدَ شَهْرٍ مِنَ الصِّيَامِ.
sentences.translation: Ramazanski bajram predstavlja neopisivu radost u arapskom svijetu, gdje se porodica i prijatelji okupljaju nakon mjeseca posta.
sentences.translationEn: Eid al-Fitr represents an indescribable joy in the Arab world, where family and friends gather after a month of fasting.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ الاِحْتِفَالَاتُ بِصَلَاةِ العِيدِ فِي السَّاحَاتِ العَامَّةِ، ثُمَّ يَتَبَادَلُ النَّاسُ التَّهَانِيَ بِقَوْلِهِمْ 'عِيدُكُمْ مُبَارَكٌ'.
sentences.translation: Proslave počinju bajram-namazom na javnim trgovima, a zatim ljudi razmjenjuju čestitke govoreći 'Eidukum Mubarak'.
sentences.translationEn: Celebrations begin with the Eid prayer in public squares, then people exchange greetings by saying 'Eidukum Mubarak'.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِئُ المَوَائِدُ بِأَشْهَى المَأْكُولَاتِ وَالحَلَوِيَّاتِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ مِثْلَ 'المَعْمُولِ' وَ'الكَعْكِ' الَّذِي يُحَضَّرُ خِصِّيصًا لِهَذِهِ المُنَاسَبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Trpeze se pune najukusnijim jelima i tradicionalnim slasticama poput 'ma'moula' i 'ka'ka' koji se pripremaju posebno za ovu priliku.
sentences.translationEn: Tables are filled with the most delicious traditional foods and sweets such as 'Maamoul' and 'Kaak' which are prepared specifically for this occasion.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَهُمُ الجَدِيدَةَ وَيَحْصُلُونَ عَلَى 'العِيدِيَّةِ'، وَهِيَ مَبْلَغٌ مَالِيٌّ يُدْخِلُ السُّرُورَ عَلَى قُلُوبِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Djeca oblače svoju novu odjeću i dobijaju 'bajramluk' (eidiyya), novčani iznos koji unosi radost u njihova srca.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear their new clothes and receive 'Eidiyya', a sum of money that brings joy to their hearts.

sentences.arabic: تَزْدَهِرُ صِلَةُ الرَّحمِ فِي هَذِهِ الأَيَّامِ، فَيَزُورُ الصِّغَارُ كِبَارَ السِّنِّ تَقْدِيرًا لَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Ovih dana cvjeta održavanje porodičnih veza, pa mlađi posjećuju starije iz poštovanja prema njima.
sentences.translationEn: Family ties flourish during these days, as the young visit the elderly in appreciation of them.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهُ وَقْتٌ لِلتَّسَامُحِ وَتَجْدِيدِ الرَّوَابِطِ الاِجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ الَّتِي تُقَوِّي نَسِيجَ المُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: To je vrijeme za praštanje i obnavljanje društvenih veza koje jačaju tkivo društva.
sentences.translationEn: It is a time for tolerance and renewing social bonds that strengthen the fabric of society.
